mapper.select: select id, task_id, file_mode, file_type, file_name, file_path, file_url, selected_sample_ids, data_usage, create_time from fault_iden_file_package where id = #{id}
select id, task_id, file_mode, file_type, file_name, file_path, file_url, selected_sample_ids, data_usage, create_time from fault_iden_file_package where task_id = #{taskId} order by id desc limit 1
